name: amon-sul
description: A self-hostable watchtower for your GCP fleet

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared -w apps/server -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared -w apps/server -w apps/web
